title: calcitrapa iberica
intro: Calcitrapa iberica, also known as the Spanish ash or prickly ash, is a plant species that belongs to the Nitrariaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and act as a natural diuretic. The health benefits of Calcitrapa iberica include reducing inflammation, improving gut health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Calcitrapa iberica can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its availability and usage may vary depending on the region and cultural practices.
